title: Method and apparatus for forming a bezel-less display
abstract: An image guide is positioned adjacent to an edge portion of a display panel, the image guide comprising a plurality of transparent plates assembled at an angle to a plane of the display substrate and extending over a bezel of the display panel. Major surfaces of the transparent plates can be coated with a reflective coating for guiding an image from the display panel to an image output face of the image guide, thereby hiding the bezel from a viewer of the display.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A display device comprising: a display panel configured to display an image; a bezel positioned over an edge portion of the display panel; and an image guide, a first portion of the image guide extending over the bezel and a second portion of the image guide positioned over the display panel adjacent the bezel, the image guide comprising a plurality of transparent plates arranged in a stack, a major surface of each plate defining a plane of the respective plate, each plane of each plate of the plurality of plates parallel with the remaining planes of each plate and oriented at an angle a relative to a viewer-side surface of the display panel, edges of the transparent plates forming an image input face and an image output face opposite the image input face, the image input face defining a plane parallel with the viewer-side surface of the display panel and the image output face defining a plane forming an angle Q with the viewer-side surface of the display panel. 2. The display device according to claim 1, wherein the angle a is in a range from about 26Â° to about 63Â°. 3. The display device according to claim 1, further comprising a light diffusing member positioned between the image input face and the display panel. 4. The display device according to claim 3, wherein the diffusing member is a Lambertian diffusing member. 5. The display device according to claim 3, wherein the diffusing member is a holographic diffusing member. 6. The display device according to claim 1, wherein the plurality of transparent plates comprise glass. 7. The display device according to claim 1, wherein the plurality of transparent plates comprise a polymer. 8. The display device according to claim 1, wherein a maximum height hmax of the image guide is equal to or less than about 3 times the sum of a width b of the image input face and a width D of the bezel. 9. The display device according to claim 1, wherein each transparent plate comprises a first major surface and a second major surface opposite the first major surface, the first and second major surfaces of each transparent plate coated with a reflective coating. 10. The display device according to claim 9, wherein the reflective coating is a dielectric coating. 11. The display device according to claim 9, wherein the reflective coating is a metallic coating. 12. The display device according to claim 11, wherein the reflective coating comprises aluminum or silver. 13. The display device according to claim 1, wherein the second portion of the image guide is disposed on a cover glass sheet positioned between the second portion and the display panel.
